source_snippet='- **Member.** Every tier beginning with basic membership receives waived resort fees on rewards stays, complimentary Wi-Fi, access to exclusive Hilton Honors Experiences, the ability to choose which available room you’d like up to 24 hours in advance, Digital Check-In/Check-Out and Digital Key through the Hilton Honors app.
- **Silver.** In addition to the Member benefits, those with Silver status also receive fifth night free accommodations on reward stays, free bottled water and a 15 percent All-Inclusive Spa Discount.
- **Gold.** Those with Gold status receive all of the above, plus space-available room upgrades and a complimentary daily food and beverage credit of up to $25 available at all Waldorf Astoria Hotels & Resorts, LXR Hotels & Resorts, Conrad Hotels & Resorts, NoMad, Canopy by Hilton, Hilton Hotels & Resorts, Curio Collection by Hilton, DoubleTree by Hilton, Signia by Hilton, Tapestry Collection by Hilton, and Hilton Garden Inn properties in the U.S., and at Motto by Hilton globally.
- **Diamond.** Diamond members earn all of the above in addition to executive lounge access, Elite status gifting, which allows you to share Gold status with any other Hilton Honors Member, and a 48-hour room guarantee, which guarantees you a room at Hilton hotels within 48 hours of a necessary booking, so you won’t be left scrambling for a room. Gold and Diamond members also receive Milestone Bonuses of 10,000 Bonus Points after 40 eligible nights, 10,000 Bonus Points for every 10 additional nights (after 40 nights) and a one-time 30,000 Bonus Points at 60 eligible nights in a calendar year. Lifetime Diamond status is awarded to those who have remained at Diamond status for 10 years.
- **Diamond Reserve.** At the top of Hilton Honors elite status sits Diamond Reserve, a new level of recognition designed for Hilton’s most loyal travelers and road warriors. Diamond Reserve members enjoy the full range of program benefits, plus Confirmable Upgrade Rewards, which allow members to secure room upgrades at the time of booking for stays of up to seven nights. The new tier also offers guaranteed 4 p.m. late checkout, a dedicated customer service desk and complimentary access to nearly a dozen of Hilton’s Premium Clubs.', confidence=1.0, The opponent's argument relies on authority weight, but the confidence weights for HIGH volatility are recency 0.5, authority 0.25, and corroboration 0.25.
